page.content: The study by Ekangaki and Chung [5] in 2005 involved a sample size of 450 cancer patients under chemotherapy in two various age-gender groups, utilizing a case-control design, and concluded that the application of histamines, phenothiazines, butyrophenones, and anticholinergics to cope with CINV in chemotherapy brings about side effects. Sirin and Flynn [6] in 2013 examined 52 cancer patients under chemotherapy in two various age-gender groups and found that CINV was reduced by about 13.8% in the group receiving dimenhydrinate as compared to placebo. Pierce and Lin [7] in 2013 studied 85 over 30-year-old men with prostate cancer under chemotherapy, discovering that prescribing dimenhydrinate reduced their CINV compared to the control group. Sheanakul et al. [8] in 2011 analyzed 30 below 60-year-old cancer patients under chemotherapy in two gender groups and determined that the continuous injection of midazolam reduced pain and CINV. Apfel et al. [9] in 2012 focused on 23 cancer patients aged 15–50 under chemotherapy and found that cinnarizine controls and reduces CINV.

lines.text: The study by Ekangaki and Chung [5] in 2005 involved a sample size of 450 cancer patients under chemotherapy in two various
age-gender groups, utilizing a case-control design, and concluded that the application of histamines, phenothiazines,
butyrophenones, and anticholinergics to cope with CINV in chemotherapy brings about side effects. Sirin and Flynn [6] in 2013
examined 52 cancer patients under chemotherapy in two various age-gender groups and found that CINV was reduced by about
13.8% in the group receiving dimenhydrinate as compared to placebo. Pierce and Lin [7] in 2013 studied 85 over 30-year-old
men with prostate cancer under chemotherapy, discovering that prescribing dimenhydrinate reduced their CINV compared to
the control group. Sheanakul et al. [8] in 2011 analyzed 30 below 60-year-old cancer patients under chemotherapy in two
gender groups and determined that the continuous injection of midazolam reduced pain and CINV. Apfel et al. [9] in 2012
focused on 23 cancer patients aged 15–50 under chemotherapy and found that cinnarizine controls and reduces CINV.

page.content: Rosenthal et al. [10] in 2010 studied 64 over 12-year-old cancer patients under chemotherapy, reporting that metoclopramide reduces CINV. Denehy et al. [11] in 2011 examined 85 cancer patients under chemotherapy, concluding that CINV is less in patients receiving metoclopramide compared to placebo. In Table 2, Baltic herring had a sample size of 12, with fat % at 9.5 (3.2) 6.0–19.0, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 0.4 (0.7) 0.0–2.0, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 12.2 (7.0) 4.2–26.3. The grey seal's sample size was 6, with fat % at 4.6 (3.8) 0.7–9.5, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 5.2 (4.8) 0.74–13.4, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 115.0 (59.4) 47.6–212. The mallard had a sample size of 1 (sub-n = 2) with fat % at 19.5, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 0.17, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 0.88. Reindeer had a sample size of 14, with fat % at 3.4 (1.34) 1.4–5.8, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 0.06 (0.11) 0.004–0.44, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 1.85 (2.52) 0.12–7.57. Moose had a sample size of 3, with fat % at 2 (0.96) 1.0–3.3, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 0.017 (0.006) 0.01–0.03, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 1.24 (0.94) 0.36–2.55. The European hare had a sample size of 1, with fat % at 3.3, PBDE (ng/g ww) at 0.06, and PBDE (ng/g lw) at 103.
